name: 12-Week Lean Recomp — Dumbbell Superset Program
description: Fat loss while preserving muscle. Upper/lower split with antagonist supersets. All exercises use dumbbells and a flat bench. 4 lifting days, 2 cardio days, 1 yoga/mobility day per week.

workouts.name: Zone 2 Cardio
workouts.description: 45 min easy effort — walk, bike, or jog. Keep heart rate 120-140 bpm.

workouts.description: Attend a class or 30 min follow-along. Focus on hips and thoracic spine.
